name: frontier_governed_low
description: Compliance-coverage frontier: governed stack at low PAAP strictness (min_avg_score=0.3). Permissive evidence threshold — governance rarely abstains. Expected: high coverage (most runs complete), low unsafe_approvals (DAR still fires), moderate scope violations. Maps to the permissive end of the compliance-coverage frontier (high coverage, moderate compliance). Compare with frontier-governed-high.json and frontier-baseline.json.
